title: carelia conyzoides
intro: Carelia conyzoides, also known as the hairy bugloss or common bugloss, is a flowering plant in the borage family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are derived from its leaves and flowers. The medicinal properties of Carelia conyzoides have been associated with various health benefits, including relief from digestive issues, skin problems, and respiratory infections. Herbal preparations of the plant are often made into teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
